mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.status, n.publisher_id, n.publish_date, n.pinned, u.username AS publisher_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN `user` u ON n.publisher_id = u.id
AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND n.type = #{type}
ORDER BY n.pinned DESC, n.publish_date DESC
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.status, n.publisher_id, n.publish_date, n.pinned, u.username AS publisher_name FROM notice n LEFT JOIN `user` u ON n.publisher_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, type, status, publisher_id, publish_date, pinned) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{publisherId}, #{publishDate}, #{pinned})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET pinned = #{pinned} WHERE id = #{id}
